nasb.text: If in his sight the scale has remained, however, and black hair has grown in it, the scale has healed, he is clean; and the priest shall pronounce him clean.

esv.text: But if in his eyes the itch is unchanged and black hair has grown in it, the itch is healed and he is clean, and the priest shall pronounce him clean.

cnv.text: 如果祭司認為，癩痢已經止住，那裡也長了黑毛；癩痢已經痊愈，那人就潔淨了，祭司要宣布他為潔淨。

ccb.text: 如果祭司看到疥癣原样未变，患处长出黑毛，那人就已经痊愈，是洁净的。祭司要宣布那人是洁净的。
